case_title: LOGICGATE INC. VS. OXYGEN INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75187521) TO PLAINTIFF LOGICGATE INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-13-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-12-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2026 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOGICGATE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OXYGEN INC. A CORPORATION $28,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $8,960.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,460.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
